summary: Iteration 119 - Full Production Health Check. Fixed critical ReportView.jsx bug (setHasAllReports destructuring error). All 31 backend API tests passed. Frontend working with all 8 case detail tabs, report view, barrister view, and export buttons.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Line 568 had incorrect useState destructuring: const [setHasAllReports] = useState(false) should be const [hasAllReports, setHasAllReports] = useState(false)

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning - minor)

critical_code_review_comments: ReportView.jsx line 568 had a critical bug that was fixed - useState destructuring was missing the first element

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages loading, all tabs working, exports working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full health check completed. All backend CRUD operations working (notes, timeline, deadlines create/delete verified). All frontend pages loading correctly. ReportView and BarristerView working with export buttons (Print, Export Word, Export PDF). Barrister View URL is /cases/:caseId/reports/:reportId/barrister (not /cases/:caseId/barrister-view). Use case_id 'case_a97ea91f0692' and report_id 'rpt_bef09b0d9664' for testing.

bug_fix_applied.impact: ReportView page was crashing with TypeError: setHasAllReports is not a function
